project.title: Full-Stack Engineering in Practice
project.subtitle: selected work
project.text: Discover Burger Studio, a full-stack application where modern frontend engineering meets scalable backend architecture. Built with React, Node.js and real-world production patterns.

skills.subtitle: technical toolkit
skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.text: A selection of modern technologies, tools, and development practices I use to build scalable frontend and backend applications.

about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Full-Stack Developer Focused on Modern Web Architecture
about.text: I build scalable frontend interfaces and backend systems with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and user experience. Using technologies such as React, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB, I create production-inspired applications that combine clean architecture with modern UI development.

contact.subtitle: Let’s Work Together
contact.title: Building Modern Web Applications with Real-World Impact
contact.text: I’m always open to discussing new opportunities, collaborations, and challenging projects. Whether it’s frontend engineering, full-stack development, or scalable web applications, I enjoy turning ideas into reliable digital products.

hero.title: Building Scalable Web Applications
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.text: I develop production-inspired full-stack applications using React,TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB — focusing on performance, clean architecture, authentication systems, and real-world user experience.
hero.info: Based in Germany • Open to Opportunities
